embedding_text: OWASP A03 Injection: never pass unsanitized user input into command execution APIs like system(), exec(), popen().
OWASP secure coding: replace gets/strcpy/sprintf with fgets/strncpy/snprintf and enforce destination buffer bounds.
OWASP guidance: prevent format string vulnerabilities by using static format strings and parameterized output formatting.
OWASP recommendation: validate arithmetic bounds before multiplication/addition used in allocation sizes to avoid integer overflow.
OWASP memory safety: set pointers to NULL after free and never dereference freed pointers to avoid use-after-free.
